raw_text: about me aerospace engineer with experience in the manufacturing and industrialisation field. skilled in technical documentation, problem-solving via queries, and bilingual training delivery within airbus defence : space projects. am passionate about aviation and highly motivated in working abroad, taking part in the resolution of complex technological-related problems in an international environment. am particularly interested in flight test activities and willing to learn new things. contact , (+34) 660 593 686 ba dfpadillaleiva@gmail.com in) www.linkedin.com/in/ daniel-padilla-leiva technical skills software: catia v5, sap, sipla, snt, 3dav documentation tools: ms office & adobe acrobat. languages: spanish (native) & english (c1 cambridge). other: strong technical writing and oral communication in english. daniel francisco padilla leiva aerospace engineer experience edv manufacturing and process engineer airtificial aerospace : defense february 2025 - present industrialisation and support tasks for the ads lta enhancements and development of versions (edv) programme. . support certification process for new systems & versions of lta serial production. . r&d implementation for ground and flight tests (snt, sipla, sap). . c-295 prototype/demo aircrafts maintenance. industrialisation and production support engineer airtificial aerospace : defense march 2023 february 2025 industrialisation of the c-295 final assembly line (fal) operations created for the airbus defence and space make in india programme. . generation and revision (wls, vis, manuals...) including spanish- english translations. . creation and editing of operations (snt). . resolution of tasl's queries collaborating with suppliers and several departments like engineering, quality, production or design (demat, catia v5). . development and delivery of operational training (on-site and remote) in english on c-295 systems and equipment to tasls personnel. traineeship as a technical author atexis november 2022 march 2023 traineeship as a manufacturing engineer alestis aerospace may 2022 july 2022 education degree in aerospace engineering university of cadiz (uca) expected graduation: 2025 - thesis (in progress): integration of a rotary engine in an unmanned aerial vehicle (uav).
